newsItems.title: David Sacks Says AI Could Drive 75% Of US GDP Growth As Morgan Stanley Sees Big Tech AI Capex Surging Past $800 Billion In 2026
newsItems.summary: On Sunday, former White House AI and crypto czar David Sacks said artificial intelligence is rapidly becoming one of the most powerful drivers of the U.S. economy as Morgan Stanley raised its forecast for hyperscaler AI infrastructure spending. Morgan Stanley Projects Massive AI Capex Boom From Big Tech Morgan Stanley

newsItems.title: Is Super Micro Stock Finally Turning a Corner After Smuggling Allegations After Earnings?
newsItems.summary: Super Micro reported better-than-expected earnings but disappointing revenue results for its fiscal third quarter.

newsItems.title: Chip Makers Push Nasdaq, S&P 500 to Fresh Highs
newsItems.summary: The semiconductor index has risen 54% since the end of March, its best performance over a 25-day period since March 2000.
